'''island''' may refer to:

* [[island (The Elder Empire: Sea)]]
* [[island (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]]

''This disambiguation page separates different subjects that share a name across the Willverse's series.''

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Disambiguation]]
[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
